home.title: Windows to the Past
home.description: VIERNULVIER has always been a beacon of culture in Ghent. Our digital archive preserves these fragments of time — from the roar of underground concerts to the quiet poetry of experimental theatre.

login.formDescription: Enter your username and password to start an authenticated session.

errors.invalidCredentials: The provided username or password is incorrect.
errors.generic: We could not sign you in right now. Please try again.

users.title: User management
users.description: Review active accounts and their effective access in a single overview.

messages.loadFailed: We could not load the user administration data right now.

empty.title: No users found
empty.description: Once accounts are created, they will appear here with their assigned roles and derived permissions.

accessDenied.title: You do not have access to user management
accessDenied.description: This section requires the users:read permission. Contact an administrator if you need access to manage accounts.
